text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm walking around<n>the school
grounds...
CRASH!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ah! I'm so sorry! Are you okay?!

Kitasan Black bumps into me and<n>drops her
belongings, scattering her<n>stuff everywhere. As I
go to pick it all<n>up...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Kita, did you drop this cold medicine?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: And this vitamin drink... Are you<n>feeling sick, Kita?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that stuff's for Dia, not me. I'm<n>heading to
visit her in the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
She has a race soon, so it's the<n>worst timing. I
know snacks won't<n>help her much, but I can't
just sit by<n>and do nothing.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
How sweet of you. Sports drinks will<n>help too!
Here, have mine!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Take this apple compote too. I was<n>just about to
give you some anyway.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's made from the apples you helped<n>me carry
home the other day.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I remember that! Thank you so<n>much! I'm
sure she'll love this!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, take this too! Just a little<n>thank-you from
Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there you are, Kita! I found that<n>thing you
wanted! ☆

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: This is so much. Are you sure?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Well, you're always helping me out.<n>It's about
time I paid you back!
choice_data_list: Let me help you carry all that.
Let me help you carry all that.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm here... Dia, are you awake?<n>How are
you feeling?
choice_data_list: I'll put the get-well-soon gifts over here.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita? Thanks for coming...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ACHOO!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You okay? Feeling chilly? I bought<n>you the cold
medicine you usually<n>take!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Everyone sent along some tasty<n>food, so eat up,
drink up, and rest up,<n>okay?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry about all this, Kita. You really<n>went out of
your way for me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? I'm<n>doing this
because I want to!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You have a race coming up,<n>remember? I want to
leave you in the<n>dust!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But there's no point if I don't beat<n>you fair and
square. I won't accept<n>the win unless you're in
tip-top<n>shape!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
See, I've got my own reasons too! So<n>just rest
up and let me handle this!
choice_data_list: Guess you'd better get well soon!
Bounce back even better than before!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
See, I've got my own reasons too! So<n>just rest
up and let me handle this!
choice_data_list: Guess you'd better get well soon!
Guess you'd better get well soon!
Bounce back even better than before!
Bounce back even better than before!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe, I suppose you're right.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to go head-to-head with you<n>one more
time... No, over and over<n>again!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
After all you've done for me... I'll<n>definitely be in
perfect condition for<n>the race!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yesss! Me too!

Together with the light from the<n>sunset, the
warmth of their bond fills<n>the whole room.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Of course! I won't let Kita outshine<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll eat my fill and get plenty of rest...<n>Then I'll
feel even better than before!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Gotcha! Okay!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has just entered the<n>gate, and
she's aiming for a full<n>recovery!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Apple compote, carrot porridge,<n>cold
medicine... I'm all set!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Will sheer good health be enough for<n>her to
outrun Kitasan Black? The race<n>to find out is
about to begin!

Laughter and delicious smells fill the<n>sunset-lit
infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll make sure to eat my fill and<n>recover!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Hm? What's that bottle over there?<n>"Golshi
Mix"?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, this must be that mystery<n>drink Gold
Ship gave me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Concentrated Antibiotic Umacillin?<n>Wow, there
are so many things here<n>I've never seen
before...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa! Hold up a sec, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Let's start with the safe stuff, shall<n>we?!
